name: Maribáñez. The world’s worst team.
original_name: Maribáñez. El peor equipo del mundo
overview: To turn the humble soccer team of Maribáñez, a small hamlet in the province of Seville, into a respected club with new aspirations; to change its wandering course in the well of the Tercera Andaluza and redirected towards higher levels; and to achieve the 'metamorphosis' of a peculiar group of moonlighters who, defending their colors, manages to unite every Sunday a town under the same feeling. The 'chosen one' to work this 'miracle'? A real 'madman' of this sport: Cristóbal Soria.

trailers.title: 'Maribáñez: el peor equipo del mundo', ESTRENO el miércoles a las 22:50 en Cuatro | Mediaset
